author: Daniel Wahnich
name: Aweb Ultimate — Full SOTA Stack + N-gram Oracle Mixing
blurb: SOTA #1 base (LeakyReLU², XSA4, Partial RoPE, LN Scale, EMA, Parallel Muon, GPTQ-lite int6) + Legal TTT + N-gram oracle cache (orders 2-8, entropy-adaptive mixing). Neural model handles general patterns, n-gram cache handles local repetitions.
